name: Large Linen Mod Drum Lampshade Gray - Threshold™: Slip Uno Fitter, No Assembly Required
description:
Add some contemporary flair to your living space with the Large Linen Mod Drum Lampshade in Gray from Threshold™. It's the perfect way to add soft, warm light to any space. This decor piece comes in gray hue that adds a sophisticated touch to your living space. An ideal companion to your favorite lamp, this large linen lampshade makes the perfect addition to your home decor.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.


Threshold™: Casual classics for house and home.
